ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "question" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "response_options" TEXT /* List of response options for the survey question (e.g., strongly agree, somewhat agree, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the survey */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the survey is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question being responded to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient responding to the survey */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response chosen by the patient (e.g., strongly agree, somewhat agree, etc.) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was submitted */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey the response corresponds to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or free-text responses from the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Text field to list any health conditions of the respondent */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question being analyzed */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response option being analyzed */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of respondents choosing this response option */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents choosing this response option */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., demographic, trend) */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
